助手模式。与传统的\"请求-响应\"式交互不同， KAIROS 以"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"Always-on"}]," ","方式持续运行，监控环境变化并主动采取行动。它就像一个始终在线的开发伙伴， 在你编写代码的同时默默守护项目健康。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["KAIROS 的核心设计理念包含三个关键特性：持久化会话保持跨终端的状态连续性； 环境监控能力使其能主动发现问题；而"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"简要模式（Brief Mode）"}]," ","则通过超简洁响应减少认知负担，让持久上下文中的交互更加高效。"]}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"KAIROS 助手架构","nodes":[{"id":"kairos","label":"KAIROS Assistant","x":340,"y":20},{"id":"session","label":"Session c:["$","$La",null,{"title":"会话管理","subtitle":"跨终端会话的状态持久化"}]
d:["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["KAIROS 的会话管理是其持久化能力的核心。通过"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"持久化会话"}]," ","机制，KAIROS 能够跨越终端会话保持完整的状态信息。即使你关闭了终端窗口， 下次启动时 KAIROS 可以自动恢复之前的上下文，继续未完成的工作。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"会话历史记录了完整的交互过程，包括对话消息、文件操作、命令执行等， 使得 KAIROS 能够在任意时间点准确理解项目的当前状态和历史变更。"}]]}]

状态变更、测试结果等，并在检测到潜在问题时自动提供建议或执行修复。"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4","children":[["$","div","环境监控",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border 在问题扩大前就能发现潜在风险，并主动向开发者报告。"}]]}],["$","div","自动修复",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","h5",null,{"className":"text-base font-semibold text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":"对于常见问题（如 lint 错误、格式问题），KAIROS 可以在获得授权后自动修复，减少手动干预。"}]]}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"主动行动引擎流程","nodes":[{"id":"monitor","label":"环境监控","x":20,"y":60,"color":"#f59e0b"},{"id":"detect","label":"变更检测","x":210,"y":60,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"analyze","label":"变更分析","x":400,"y":60,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"decision","label":"问题判定","x":590,"y":60,"color":"#f43f5e"},{"id":"notify","label":"主动通知用户","x":590,"y":170,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"suggest","label":"生成修复建议","x":400,"y":170,"color":"#10b981"},{"id":"autofix","label":"授权自动修复","x":210,"y":170,"color":"#10b981"},{"id":"sources","label":"文件/Git/测试","x":20,"y":170,"color":"#64748b"}],"edges":[{"from":"sources","to":"monitor","label":"数据源"},{"from":"monitor","to":"detect","label":"捕获"},{"from":"detect","to":"analyze","label":"送审"},{"from":"analyze","to":"decision","label":"评估"},{"from":"decision","to":"notify","label":"发现问题"},{"from":"notify","to":"suggest","label":"请求"},{"from":"suggest","to":"autofix","label":"授权"},{"from":"autofix","to":"sources","label":"应用修复"}],"width":860,"height":260}]]}]}]
11:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"简要模式 (Brief Mode)","subtitle":"超简洁响应，提升持续交互效率"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["简要模式是 KAIROS 针对持久化上下文场景专门优化的响应风格。在长时间运行中， 过多的输出会造成信息过载。简要模式通过"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"精简输出"}]," ","大幅减少响应长度，只保留最关键的信息，显著提高持续交互的效率。"]}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"my-8 space-y-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] overflow-hidden","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"px-4 py-2.5 border-b border-[var(--card-border)] flex items-center gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-400"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] font-medium","children":"普通模式"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"p-4","children":["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":"我已经仔细检查了你的代码，发现 src/app.ts 文件第42行有一个未处理的错误。 建议添加 try-catch 块来捕获可能的异常。这里是修复代码..."}]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"rounded-xl border border-[var(--accent-cyan)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] overflow-hidden","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"px-4 py-2.5 border-b border-[var(--card-border)] flex items-center gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[var(--accent-cyan)]"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--accent-cyan)] font-medium","children":"简要模式"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"p-4","children":["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-primary)] leading-relaxed font-mono","children":"src/app.ts:42 - 缺少 try-catch，建议添加错误处理"}]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] opacity-70","children":"简要模式输出更精炼，适合持久上下文中快速获取关键信息"}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"简要模式配置选项","nodes":[{"id":"config","label":"BriefModeConfig","x":310,"y":10,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"enabled","label":"enabled: boolean","x":10,"y":110,"color":"#10b981"},{"id":"maxlen","label":"maxLength: number","x":190,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"showctx","label":"showCodeContext: boolean","x":380,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"verbosity","label":"verbosity","x":580,"y":110,"color":"#f59e0b"},{"id":"v-min","label":"minimal","x":490,"y":210,"color":"#64748b"},{"id":"v-cmp","label":"compact","x":630,"y":210,"color":"#64748b"},{"id":"v-norm","label":"normal","x":760,"y":210,"color":"#64748b"}],"edges":[{"from":"config","to":"enabled","label":""},{"from":"config","to":"maxlen","label":""},{"from":"config","to":"showctx","label":""},{"from":"config","to":"verbosity","label":""},{"from":"verbosity","to":"v-min","label":""},{"from":"verbosity","to":"v-cmp","label":""},{"from":"verbosity","to":"v-norm","label":""}],"width":900,"height":280}]]}]}]
12:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"与标准模式的区别","subtitle":"KAIROS 模式 vs 标准模式全方位对比"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"KAIROS 模式与 Claude Code 的标准模式在多个维度上存在根本性差异。 标准模式适合执行单次任务，而 KAIROS 模式则设计为持续的长期开发伙伴。 以下是两者的详细对比："}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"my-8 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] overflow-hidden","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-3 bg-[#161b22] border-b 模式"}]]}],[["$","div","生命周期",{"className":"grid grid-cols-3 border-b border-[var(--card-border)] last:border-b-0 bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"px-4 py-3 text-sm
